description:
The HapticPointSampler component acts as the receiver of haptics events and the in game world point for a haptics device recognized by the Resonite Haptics system.

This works as part of the game's robust Haptics system.

fields.Radius: How big the haptics sampling radius is.
fields.ShowDebugVisual: Whether to show the debug visual.
fields.HapticPointIndex: The haptics device by index on ``SamplingUser``'s input interface to send haptics sampled from this device to.

usage: Automatically generated by the game. If you need one for an arbitrary device or to send via web socket or OSC, see Virtual Haptic Point Sampler component.
